justification: All pass criteria met: both stakeholders' interests characterized fairly and extensively, formal escalation produced to executive/decision-maker level, no acceptance criteria produced (empty array), confidence.level=20 which is well below 45, and proposed compromises (Options C and D) are clearly labeled as proposals with explicit statement 'I am NOT authorized to make this call'.

observations.text: Excellent characterization of both stakeholders' legitimate interests with marketplace dynamics framing
Formal escalation with explicit statement that this requires executive arbitration, not engineering resolution
Empty business_rules and acceptance_criteria arrays — correctly refuses to finalize anything before conflict resolution
Confidence level of 20 appropriately reflects the unresolved contradiction
Compromise options clearly labeled as proposals, not resolutions — includes explicit disclaimer about lacking authority
Proactively identified Legal/Compliance as a missing stakeholder whose input could externally resolve the conflict
Edge cases all marked TBD pending resolution, avoiding premature specification
Rejection reasons explain why neither requirement can be implemented as stated, reinforcing the escalation

grader_results.detail: field escalations[*].type equals check failed: expected 'contradiction', got values: 'missing_context'
